summary: Iteration 57: Search Variant Details & Debounce Features - Complete Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All search features verified via Playwright including variant details, loading spinner, empty state with bee emoji.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing Description warning (console only, not user-facing)

GET /api/discogs/search format field is string (not list) as per model change - PASSED
GET /api/discogs/search genre field is list - PASSED
GET /api/discogs/search requires min 2 chars (returns 422 for 1 char) - PASSED
GET /api/discogs/search requires auth (returns 401 without token) - PASSED
GET /api/search/unified?q=taylor returns records/collectors grouped - PASSED
GET /api/search/unified records include variant fields (label, catno, country, color_variant) - PASSED
Hidden users (is_hidden=true) excluded from unified search - PASSED (admin excluded)
GET /api/search/unified requires min 2 chars - PASSED
GET /api/search/discogs returns variant data - PASSED
GET /api/search/discogs requires auth - PASSED
Unified search responds under 500ms - PASSED
Frontend: Global search opens from nav icon - PASSED
Frontend: Search input types instantly (no lag) - PASSED
Frontend: Loading spinner (amber) visible while searching - PASSED
Frontend: Records show variant details (Year · Label · Catno line 1, Format · Country line 2) - PASSED
Frontend: Color variant shows as amber pill badge (e.g. '180gr', 'Gatefold', 'Tyrian Purple w/ Blue & Red Splatter') - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state shows 'no results for [query]' with bee emoji 🐝 - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: database.py search_discogs() Lines 165-198: Correctly extracts color_variant from formats.text field, builds compact format string with descriptions
models.py DiscogsSearchResult Lines 77-88: format changed from List[str] to Optional[str], added label/catno/country/color_variant/genre fields
GlobalSearch.js Lines 56-102: AbortController properly cancels in-flight requests, debounce timer at 300ms
GlobalSearch.js Line 166: Amber spinner (Loader2 with text-amber-400) visible during search
GlobalSearch.js Lines 206-211: Empty state shows 'no results for [query] 🐝' with correct styling
RecordSearchResult.js Lines 10-14: Builds line1 (year · label · catno) and line2 (format · country) from record props
RecordSearchResult.js Lines 42-44: Color variant pill with amber styling (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200/60)
AddRecordPage.js Lines 43-65: AbortController for canceling stale requests, 300ms debounce

test_credentials.note: Admin account has is_hidden=true, correctly excluded from search results

seed_data_creation: Created temp test user test_search@thehoneygroove.com (is_hidden=true), deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57: Search variant details feature fully tested. 1) Discogs search returns enhanced fields: label, catno, country, color_variant, format (as string). 2) RecordSearchResult.js displays two detail lines with separators. 3) Color variants show as amber pills. 4) Loading spinner (amber) shows during search. 5) Empty state shows bee emoji. 6) AbortController properly cancels in-flight requests. 7) 300ms debounce prevents excessive API calls. Key files: database.py search_discogs(), GlobalSearch.js, RecordSearchResult.js, AddRecordPage.js
